reference_images.label: ui
reference_images.purpose: Ground the score and game-over UI placement and text sizing.

reference_images.label: style
reference_images.purpose: Ground the monochrome pixel-art outline and spacing.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/chrome_dino_runner/trial_4/art_000017.png with AssetServer during Loading state and keep the handle in a resource entry keyed by art_000017.
runtime_notes: Apply nearest-neighbor sampling and integer-pixel transforms at runtime.
Keep the authored 1x pixel ratio and scale only by integer multiples in camera space.
Use a deterministic startup registration order so task execution order maps to asset registration order.
Spawn the sprite as a single-image handle with no runtime atlas index changes.

context.usage: Render the GAME OVER title near screen center after a collision freeze.

shape.silhouette: Centered uppercase text block reading GAME OVER in 24 px pixel font.

acceptance_criteria: The title text is horizontally centered in the authored image and remains readable at 1x pixel scale.
Visible pixels use only #535353, #F7F7F7, and #FF0000 plus transparency.
